title: taraxacum darbandense
intro: Taraxacum darbandense, also known as Darband dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus, native to Iran. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The plant's health benefits include supporting liver function, reducing blood pressure, and aiding in digestion. Taraxacum darbandense can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
